rule: hit = (kw>=2) OR (sem>=0.7) OR (func>=0.7); independent scoring per result; total_hits sums distinct hit results
candidate_summary: STAR-MOLE radial-input foveal concentration: K=2 fixed foveal token positions + 2x head allocation for foveal positions + content routing into fovea between layers; recombines fixed-position fovea + 2x head count + content routing.

results_analysis.title: Attention Sinks and Compression Valleys Same Coin (2510.06477)
results_analysis.rationale: Triple hit: keyword (attention sink + fixed position + over-represented activation), semantic 0.82, functional 0.78. Same fixed-position fovea-like concentration STAR-MOLE designs explicitly.

results_analysis.title: Why do LLMs attend to the first token? (2504.02732)
results_analysis.rationale: Triple hit: kw=2 (first-token sink, fixed-positional fovea), sem 0.84, func 0.74. Overwhelming first-token attention is precisely the fixed-position fovea behavior STAR-MOLE prescribes.

results_analysis.title: Attention Sinks: Catch, Tag, Release Mechanism for Embeddings
results_analysis.rationale: Triple hit: kw=3, sem 0.86 (highest), func 0.82 (highest). Exact match for STAR-MOLE's content-routing-into-fovea between layers.

results_analysis.title: SinkTrack: Context Anchoring via Attention Sinks
results_analysis.rationale: Triple hit: kw=3, sem 0.82, func 0.80. DESIGNED fixed-position sink anchors are functionally the same as STAR-MOLE's K=2 fixed foveal positions.

results_analysis.title: When Attention Sink Emerges (ICLR 2025)
results_analysis.rationale: Triple hit: kw=2 (attention sink + emergence), sem 0.76, func 0.70 (at threshold). Same phenomenon class as STAR-MOLE's designed fovea.

results_analysis.title: Attention Sink in LLMs and Applications
results_analysis.rationale: Hit via kw=2 and sem 0.72. Functional 0.65 below threshold; still hits rule via kw and sem channels.

results_analysis.title: Transformer Depth vs Width, Positional Encoding Tricks
results_analysis.rationale: No channel hits. ALiBi per-head slopes are head heterogeneity but not fixed-position fovea + content routing.

results_analysis.title: Awesome Attention Heads survey
results_analysis.rationale: No channel hits. Generic survey, not fixed-position fovea allocation.

verdict_sentence: Candidate FAILS novelty: 6 of 8 prior-art results hit (kw=6, sem=6, func=5), with 5 distinct effect clusters (attention sinks, first-token sink, catch-tag-release content routing, SinkTrack designed anchors, sink emergence) above functional threshold; STAR-MOLE's three components (fixed-position fovea, 2x head allocation, content routing into fovea) are each substantially anticipated by attention-sink/SinkTrack literature, far exceeding the 1-hit fail threshold.
